_status_line: Adopted Scout’s HIGH-confidence angle · locked competitor contrast as supporting · decided REEL format · briefed Copy for precision hook.

primary_angle.title: 40.35mm exact. 0.7mm lip. FKM rubber. No drilling.
primary_angle.core_message: The Cradle Adapter V1 is the only wrist conversion kit engineered to the Royal Pop’s exact 40.35 mm case, 0.7 mm retaining lip, and 22 mm lug width—using FKM rubber for a secure, scratch-free fit without drilling or glue.
primary_angle.why_this_wins: Matches the proven 'spec-driven' hook pattern while directly addressing Helvetus’s FKM claim. Precision specs (40.35 mm, 0.7 mm) and material (FKM) are the two most credible differentiators against generic straps and cheaper adapters.
primary_angle.audience: Royal Pop owners who value engineering precision and material authenticity over generic strap solutions.
primary_angle.desired_reaction: ‘This is the adapter I’ve been waiting for—exact fit, no damage, and premium material.’

supporting_angle.title: Helvetus built an adapter. We built the kit.
supporting_angle.purpose: Contrast against Helvetus’s FKM adapter by positioning Cradle Adapter V1 as a complete wrist conversion *kit*—not just an adapter. Addresses today’s ‘Competitor contrast’ focus while avoiding direct comparison language.

content_decision.goal: Demonstrate engineering precision and material authenticity in 7 seconds to drive waitlist signups.
content_decision.conversion_role: First 3 seconds: specs (40.35 mm, 0.7 mm, FKM). Next 4 seconds: no-drill/no-glue fit. End frame: Pre-Order Now CTA.

creative_direction.tone: Premium, direct, slightly obsessive about fit and finish.
creative_direction.pace: Fast cuts (1.5–2 seconds per clip) to match spec-driven energy.
creative_direction.visual_energy: High—close-ups of adapter fitting Royal Pop case, FKM rubber texture, and crown notch alignment.
must_show: Cradle Adapter V1 on wrist with Royal Pop
must_not_do: Show generic straps or competitors’ products
Overpromise colourways (only show live website colours: Monochrome, Arctic Blue, Cobalt Orange, Green Eight, Otto Rosso)

success_metric.secondary: Comments asking about fit, material, or pre-order timing.

brief_for_copy.script_goal: Compress the primary angle into a 7-second hook: ‘40.35mm exact. 0.7mm lip. FKM rubber. No drilling.’ Preserve all specs and material. End with ‘Pre-Order Now.’
brief_for_copy.caption_goal: Reinforce engineering precision and material authenticity. Include disclaimer: ‘Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.’

website_truth.verified_disclaimer: Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Swatch Group Ltd or Audemars Piguet.
